name: centraid-monorepo
description: Centraid — personal app builder for desktop, installable web, and mobile clients.

scripts.coverage: node scripts/test-report/prepare.mjs --lane vitest && node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --coverage --reporter=default --reporter=json --outputFile=artifacts/test-results/vitest.json
scripts.test:perf: node scripts/test-report/prepare.mjs --lane perf && node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.perf.config.ts
scripts.test:scale: node scripts/test-report/prepare.mjs --lane scale && node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config vitest.scale.config.ts
scripts.test:quality:nightly: bun run test:perf && bun run test:scale && bun run test:report
scripts.perf:gateway: turbo run build --filter=@centraid/gateway && bun run --cwd packages/gateway perf:low-end
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint
scripts.check:pr: bun run format:check && bunx oxlint . && bunx turbo run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:types && bun run lint:css && bun run test:matrix
